commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0beb860f875af6a1832063f66c6a54cdf6998c73)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a canonical MessagePresentation capability-limit API, adapts presentation payloads per channel, renders controls natively across several channels, deprecates legacy interactive APIs, and updates docs/tests/API baselines.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of PR head 0beb860f875af6a1832063f66c6a54cdf6998c73 shows the Telegram nullish override, row-limited priority counterexample, and Teams injected-deps bypass; I did not run live channel proof in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human handling is required because the PR has a protected maintainer label, mock-only real behavior proof, and blocking P2 findings that need author or maintainer follow-through before merge.
